title: UserDoc
description: Firestore `users/{uid}` document — the integration boundary between apps/web (writes via Stripe webhook handlers) and apps/mobile (reads to gate paid features). NOTE: legacy mobile reads only `isPaid`; legacy web writes the rich subscription fields. The unified architecture (Phase 6) decides whether `isPaid` is kept as a denormalized convenience or derived at read time from `status`.

status.description: Subscription lifecycle state, mirrored from Stripe by the webhook handler in apps/web.

current_period_end.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the current billing period ends. Mirrored from Stripe.

stripe_customer_id.description: Stripe customer ID. Used to launch the customer portal.

stripe_subscription_id.description: Stripe subscription ID. Used by webhook event reconciliation.

isPaid.description: Legacy denormalized flag. Mobile app currently reads this directly. Kept for backward compatibility; new code should derive from `status === 'active'`.
